why_now: Reported vulnerability in Kiro IDE with available patch.
recommended_actions_24h: Update Kiro IDE to version 0.11.133 or later
Monitor authentication token cache file permissions
recommended_actions_7d: Implement additional access controls for sensitive data
title: CVE-2026-11931: Kiro IDE Auth Token Exposure
summary: [P1] Kiro IDE on macOS and Linux before version 0.11.133 has insecure permissions on authentication token cache files, potentially allowing unauthorized access. A patch is available in version 0.11.133 or later. Why now: Reported vulnerability in Kiro IDE with available patch. (confidence: 0.90)
classification_reasoning: Kiro IDE vulnerability affects application layer and involves data disclosure.

primary.title: CVE-2026-11931 - Insecure Permissions on Authentication Token Cache File in Kiro IDE
